# CANDIDATE: V14_V15_PARAM_SWEEP_KEEPER_001

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** parameter_optimization
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-OOS)

## Hypothesis

Tighter trendline_stop (-0.06) combined with aggressive runner_target (3.0) improves edge_capture by capturing J winner days while avoiding J loser days. The high runner target allows trendline setups to ride larger moves while the tight stop limits damage on failed setups.

## Mechanism

This is a parameter sweep keeper, not a new trigger. The combo modifies exit parameters for existing v14/v15 trade classes:

- **trendline_stop:** -0.06 (was -0.08 in baseline) — tighter stop for trendline rejections
- **super_tp1:** 1.0 (was 0.75) — take full premium as TP1 on SUPER quality
- **runner_target:** 3.0 (was 2.0) — runner exits at 3x entry premium
- **level_qty:** 18 (was 10) — more aggressive leveling
- **level_stop:** -0.10 (was -0.15) — tighter stop on level entries
- **level_tp1:** 0.30 (was 0.40) — earlier TP on level exits

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | +$342 (baseline) | +$306.30 (captured) | -$35.70 |
| 5/01 winner | +$470 (baseline) | -$16.17 (missed) | -$486.17 |
| 5/04 winner | +$730 (baseline) | +$804.72 (captured) | +$74.72 |
| 5/05 loser | -$260 (baseline) | $0.00 (skipped) | +$260.00 |
| 5/06 loser | -$300 (baseline) | $0.00 (skipped) | +$300.00 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | -$45 (baseline) | $0.00 (skipped) | +$45.00 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | -$120 (baseline) | $0.00 (skipped) | +$120.00 |

**Net edge_capture:** $1,110.02 winners captured - $0 losers added = **$1,110.02** (exceeds $771 threshold).

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=18 × ~$1.00 premium = ~$1,800 capital required. $1K paper realizes ~56% of headline P&L. Requires $25K+ for full position per risk-rules.md.
2. **Sample bias:** 432-combo sweep, 5 keepers selected. Parameter optimization on fixed 16-month dataset — overfit risk MEDIUM. No hold-out window used in sweep.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS — walk-forward not yet run. IS-only result.
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS — BS sim only, no OPRA validation.
5. **Failure modes:**
   - WR=16.1% (57/353) — extremely low, strategy depends on large runners
   - Q2-2026 shows -$1,120.28 loss (recent regime may be adverse)
   - If runner_target=3.0 rarely hits, strategy underperforms
   - 5/01 missed entirely (-$486 delta) — the combo failed to capture a J winner
6. **Concentration:** top5_pct=13.23% — EXCELLENT. Returns well-distributed across days.

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Walk-forward OOS validation (IS: 2025-01..2025-09, OOS: 2025-10..2026-05)
- [ ] Real-fills check on top 3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04)
- [ ] Gym validators pass
- [ ] J Rule 9 ratification

## Confidence

5/10 — Edge_capture passes but low WR + missed 5/01 winner + no OOS validation = significant uncertainty. Recommend OOS walk-forward before further action.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates. Complements #12 (V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K) which also optimizes v14e exit params but with different parameter ranges. This keeper uses trendline_stop=-0.06 specifically (vs #12's focus on tp1/runner/profit_lock).
